# Coding Plan for openclaw/openclaw#60237: [Feature]: Add threadPromptGuideline for customizable auto-generated Discord thread titles

Source report: [records/openclaw-openclaw/items/60237.md](records/openclaw-openclaw/items/60237.md)

## Summary

Keep open. Current main still has the fixed Discord generated-thread-title prompt and no per-channel `threadPromptGuideline` config type, strict schema entry, runtime plumbing, docs entry, or custom-guideline test; the related merged generated-title PR added `autoThreadName: "generated"` but not this customization.

## Plan

Implement the Discord feature request from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/60237. Add an optional per-guild-channel `threadPromptGuideline` string for `autoThreadName: "generated"`; validate it with a 500-character maximum; carry it through Discord channel config resolution; pass it into generated-title creation; and append it as bounded operator guidance while preserving the existing concise title-only system constraints. Update `src/config/types.discord.ts`, `src/config/zod-schema.providers-core.ts`, generated channel config metadata, Discord config schema tests, Discord allow-list/runtime plumbing, generated-title and auto-thread tests, `docs/channels/discord.md`, and `CHANGELOG.md`. Do not widen the field to top-level or guild-root Discord config, do not replace the fixed system prompt wholesale, and do not fold in separate timeout/token or auto-thread-gating changes from other PRs.

- `extensions/discord/src/monitor/thread-title.ts`
- `extensions/discord/src/monitor/threading.auto-thread.ts`
